name: British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit
description: The British Berkefeld Household Filter kit is a gravity fed two-bucket ceramic candle filter for household use.

taxonomy.sub_category: British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit Updated on January 11, 2024 · Created on September 27, 2018 British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit The British Berkefeld Household Filter kit is a gravity fed two-bucket ceramic candle filter for household use. Developed By Doulton Tested By Centre for Affordable Water and Sanitation Technologies (CAWST) Humanitarian Innovation Fund (HIF) Content Partners Centre for Affordable Water and Sanitation Technologies (CAWST) Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The British Berkefeld Household Filter Kit is a tabletop filter produced in the UK by Doulton. The kit includes two, three, or four ceramic candles, two 16 L buckets with snap-on lids, a dispensing tap for the storage container, the required hardware (such as washers and nuts) for installation, and a tool to measure the diameter of the candles. According to the manufacturer, kits sold for emergency response typically come with two silver-impregnated Sterasyl ceramic candles. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household, Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations British Berkefeld distributes the Household Filter kit via organizations such as UN Habitat and Lifewater Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Katadyn Drip , Kohler Clarity Water Filter , Rainfresh MP4U Gravity Filter , Tulip Table Top Filter , and Nazava Water Filter . Regions Worldwide Manufacturing/Building Method Made in the UK by Doulton with these specifications: 2 BPA free food grade polypropylene containers with snap on lids Available with 2, 3 or 4 ceramic filter candles 7” long x 2” diameter with long threaded mount 1 Black Rubber Sealing Washer for each candle fitted 1 Black Plastic Wing Nut for each candle fitted 1 Plastic dispensing tap with plastic threaded nut and 2 black rubber washers. Intellectural Property Type Select Type User Provision Model Users can obtain the product from distributing NGOs and Aid Agencies or directly from the manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status The Household filter kit has been exported in pallets of 100 to more than 140 countries for disaster response. Type of filter Ceramic candle filter Primary material of construction Silver-impregnated ceramic Additives No Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 2 L Bacteria reduction 4 log Virus reduction Unknown Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) <0.5 NTU Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Maintenance schedule Scrub filter candles when flow is reduced Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) 10,000 liters Safe water storage integration 8 liters Design Specifications The kit includes two, three, or four ceramic candles, two 16 L buckets with snap-on lids, a dispensing tap for the storage container, the required hardware (such as washers and nuts) for installation, and a tool to measure the diameter of the candles. According to the manufacturer, kits sold for emergency response typically come with two silver-impregnated Sterasyl ceramic candles. Product Schematics Technical Support Contact the manufacturer Replacement Components The regular Sterasyl filter cartridge containing only silver-impregnated ceramic is not available for purchase online, but the upgraded Super Sterasyl, containing activated carbon for additional chemicals removal is available for sale online for $22. Lifecycle It is recommended to change the filter cartridges every 12 months for the daily use of a 4 person. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Each Sterasyl filter candle is designed to filter 10,000 liters and last a family 12 months. The Household filter kit contains 2, 3 or 4 ceramic filter candles, with an expected flow rate of output of up to 1 liter per candle per hour. Vetted Performance Status The performance was tested as part of the Humanitarian Innovation Fund’s Emergency Household Water Filter Challenge. Safety No safety risks. Complementary Technical Systems Pre-filter such as a cloth for turbid waters. Academic Research and References “British Water Filter Systems & Water Filter Cartridges,” Doulton Water Filters Limited. Available: https://www.hwts.info/products-technologies/62d9fef4/british-berkefeld-household-filter-kit Compliance with regulations NSF and WRAS compliant. Evaluation methods Tested by HIF evaluators for ease-of-use, performance in removing contaminants, flow rate, and affordability.
